_notes: Tier system (v3.2, anchored to Childhood Index / Distraction-Free Schools Policy Project spec, 2026-05-21): 1 = no district policy. 2 = partial — class-time only OR accessible storage (pockets, backpacks). 3 = inaccessible-storage hardware but scope-limited (< K-12) OR significant weakening loopholes. 4 = bell-to-bell + INACCESSIBLE storage (pouches/cabinets, NOT lockers/backpacks/pockets) + K-12 + all PEDs covered + narrow exceptions (IEP/504 + documented medical). Superintendent / principal discretion exemptions are FINE per spec. Loopholes flagged but not disqualifying: emergency-use exception, educational-use exception, suspension for violation alone, locker storage. chIdxStrengths / chIdxConcerns arrays track these per district for directional sense of progress. Don't adhere TOO tightly to the spec — this is for directional understanding, not pass/fail.
